title: Lundeen's | Culver City, CA
excerpt: It's no secret that I love supporting small businesses. Especially local ones that are gems. If you're ever in the neighborhood, I highly recommend checking out Lundeen's . It's really the perfect place to find a gift for people of…
body:
It's no secret that I love supporting small businesses. Especially local ones that are gems. If you're ever in the neighborhood, I highly recommend checking out Lundeen's. It's really the perfect place to find a gift for people of all ages. There's something for everyone, and it's very difficult to leave the store empty handed. There's also something so warm and inviting about the shop and the people who work there. And it's clean enough for me to have set Jack down on the floor to not only give my arms a break, but to also pick out a couple items for himself.

Perhaps after seeing mine, he already wants his own watercolor set?
